titleStmt.title: SII 19.322: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 322. (A.R. No. 129 of 1911.) TIRUVARĀMĒŚVARAM, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE maṇḍapa IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, RĀMANĀTHĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is mutilated in the middle and at the end. It seems to record an order issued by Periya-Tirumañjuṇappittar, allotting the quantity of paddy required for offerings and for burning lamps during the different services in the temple of Tiruvirāmīśvarattu-Mahādēva at Madanamanjari-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Nenmali-nāḍu out of the produce from the lands which had been endowed to it by several persons. This Tirumañjuṇappittar is also mentioned in an inscription of the 6th year of Rājakēsarivarman from the same Village (S.I.I., Vol. XIII. No. 137). This is assignable to Ūttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu neṉmalināṭṭu brahmadeyam matanamañcaricaturvvetimaṅkalattu tiruvirāmiśvarattu mahādevar nilaṅkaḷ periya tirumañ cu�ttar niyokappaṭi nivantañ ceyta pari kañ ceṉ nelarici nāṉāḻiyun tūpparuppu Irunāḻiyum teṅkāy Oṉṟum veṇponakañ ceṉnelarici Aṟunāḻiyum Uccampotai sandhikku ceṉnelarici kuṟuṇi
yirunāḻiyum Ardhayāmattukku ceṉnelarici kuṟuṇiyirunāḻiyum Aṭhaṅikāryyattukku muḻākkum kṣetrapālaṉukku Ayuḻakkum nālu sandhikku neyyamurtu Aṭhaṅikāryat toṉoṭokkum nāḻiyāl nāṉāḻiyum kummāyattukku nāḻip paruppum kummāyamum porikkaṟiyumuṭpaṭa potu nālu kaṟiyamirtum Āḻvārkku Aṭaikkāyamirtupo ku viṟa
kukku muṭpaṭa Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa paṭimāṟṟukku vaiytta nilam vireśvaravāykkā lukku kiḻakku mutaṟkuṭumpil talaippāṭakattu vasa�m mitaṉoṭumaṭaiya Iraṇṭāṅkuṭumpu talaippāṭakattu � Araikkāṇiyu mānattaṅ kallakkūṭina nila kāṇi Araiye nāṉkumāccinnamum paṟpanābhavāykkālukku meṟku Ittevar toṭṭattukkuk kiḻakku nāṟṟukkāl Oru mākkā(kā)ṇiyum Āṟu kuṭumpil Iraṇṭām pāṭakam kuṇṭūr caṉnakumāra kramavittaṉiṭai vilaikoṇṭa nilam Arai
kkāṇicciṉṉamum tirumaṭaippaḷḷip puṟamāka vaittatu Innilattukku Eruvaṭṭa vaiytta manaiyāvana tiruvātiraicceri miyciṟaki laṟaipāṭaka nālu nontā viḷakku Āṟukku Iravum pakalum Erikka vaitta nilam panmanābhavāykkālukku kiḻakku muṉṟāṅkuṭumpil talaippāṭakattukku kiḻakkaṭaiya kokkarai Amaṉattac comāci paṭṭālakaṉ vaitta nilam
pāṭakattu meṟkaṭaiya nilam Araikkālum Āka nilam Eḻumāvaraiyum �8- ṅkuṭumpil talaippāṭakam panmanābhavāykkāliṉ kiḻai neṭukiṉ �ṇiyum Āka nilam Eṭṭumāmukkāṇiyum Ātittavatikku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu raṇṭāṅ kuṭumpil muṉṟām pāṭakattuk kuṇṭūr śrīdharakramavittar Araiviḷakkukku vaitta nilam tevar bhaṇṭārattuk kācu kuṭuttu Iṟaiyiḻittiṉ nilam Oru māvarai
Digital edition of SII 19.322 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
